provisions: Releases: general release does not apply to MD Franchise Law claims
Governing law: MD law for MD Franchise Law claims
Forum: franchisee may bring action in MD for MD Franchise Law claims
Limitation of claims: 3 years for MD Franchise Law claims
Acknowledgments: Section 1.B deleted; merger clause modified
No release/estoppel/waiver of MD Franchise Law liability
Releases: release does not apply to extent prohibited by MN Franchises Law
Termination: 90-day notice (60 to cure), 180-day nonrenewal notice per MN Stat. 80C.14
Liquidated damages: may not be enforceable under Minn. Rule 2860.4400J
Forum: no out-of-state litigation under MN Stat. 80C.21
Jury trial waiver: deleted if required by MN law
Limitation of claims: 3 years per MN Stat. 80C.17
Releases: release does not apply to extent prohibited by ND Franchise Investment Law
Noncompete: generally unenforceable in ND but franchisor will seek enforcement to extent allowed
Liquidated damages: may not be enforceable under ND Franchise Investment Law
Governing law: ND law governs (replacing GA law)
Forum: may bring action in ND to extent required by ND law
Punitive damages/jury trial waiver: deleted if required by ND law
Limitation of claims: may be modified by ND law
